task_description: Implement Phase 3 of Movistan: Efficiency-vs-Baseline Metric. Build a single-agent baseline runner with identical tool access to debate agents, a comparison report generator that measures category overlap and token costs, and a script/test harness to produce the comparison artifact for the submission writeup.

verification.summary: All 59 tests pass (13 baseline-runner, 46 baseline-comparison). Review issues addressed: (1) within-arm deduplication via deduplicateCategories(), (2) MIN_SUBSTRING_LENGTH=10 guard + min 2-word requirement on word overlap, (3) persona hint documented as known limitation, (4) deduplication applied in generateComparisonReport before overlap computation. Pre-existing type errors in output-validator.test.ts, prompt-builder.test.ts, ui-logic.test.ts remain unchanged.
